faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the SVNIT Surat recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat recruitment is Teaching Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Teaching Assistant post at SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in date for the Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the Teaching Assistant position is 29 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Teaching Assistant role ranges from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications include M.Sc., M.S., M.Tech., M.E., M.C.A., M.Sc. (IT), Integrated M.Sc., Integrated M.S., Dual Degree Programmes, or Ph.D. in relevant disciplines like Mathematics, Mathematics and Computing, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, etc.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Written Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at the SVNIT Surat office.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
